Title: 435i (tool only)
Description:
Experience the premium cutting performance of the Husqvarna 435i. This 40V battery-powered chainsaw features optimized torque and a high chain speed, paired with proprietary X-PRECISION chain, to deliver clean, precise cuts. And the weatherproof design is IPX4 certified, so you can get the job done in rain or shine. All Husqvarna battery tools feature proprietary active cooling technology to deliver more consistent power and extend battery life.
The user-friendly keypad allows you to quickly check battery status and error indications and start and stop with just the push of a button. The battery through body design makes it easy to remove the battery when it needs to be charged and reduces the risk of wooden chips and dust accumulating in the battery compartment. There is also the savE™ mode that provides maximum run time and is ideal for tasks that do not require full power. And when other kinds of garden tasks call for attention, the 36V battery can be used for several other Husqvarna tools.

Title: 122LKH
Description: Trim hedges with ease with the Husqvarna 122LKH. With a long 21" cutter bar, this hedge trimmer features double-sided, double reciprocating blades, creating clean, precise cuts. And it's easy to start, thanks to air purge and Smart Start® technology. Attachment-capable, this multi-purpose machine lets you complete multiple jobs with one tool (attachments sold separately).

Title: 122L
Description: Trimming is easy with the Husqvarna 122L. This straight-shaft string trimmer is easy to start, thanks to air purge and Smart Start® technology. And it's easy to use and maneuver, with intuitive controls and a lightweight design. The Tap 'n' Go trimmer head is easy to use and refill.

Title: 122LX
Description: Make yard work a breeze with the Husqvarna 122LX. This straight-shaft string trimmer features Smart Start® technology and air purge for hassle-free starting. While the lightweight build and soft grip handles offer comfortable control and easy maneuverability. High-capacity RapidReplace™ trimmer head lets you reload line in just three simple steps - so you can get back to trimming without missing a beat.

Title: 122LKP
Description: Trim even the highest branches with the Husqvarna 122LKP. With an up to 12' reach, this pole saw easily cuts limbs up to 8" thick. And proprietary X-CUT® chain delivers a superior cutting performance, with the optimized cutting angle and long-lasting sharpness. Attachment-capable, this multi-purpose machine lets you complete multiple jobs with one tool (attachments sold separately).
VariantName: 970 79 62-01 (122LK-P POLE SAW Gas Pole saw, Split shaft, 10" bar)

Title: 122LKE
Description: Get the perfect finishing touch with the Husqvarna 122LKE. Featuring a large 6" adjustable wheel, this edger lets you create a precise, smooth edge to your lawn quickly and easily. You'll also work more comfortably with the curved shaft, designed to enhance balance and reduce fatigue. Attachment-capable, this multi-purpose machine lets you complete multiple jobs with one tool (attachments sold separately).

Title: Z246
Description: Performance and style hit the grass running with the all new Z200 Series Zero Turn Mowers. Cutting edge design, proven performance and new innovative features combine to make lawn maintenance an event instead of a chore.

Title: Z254
Description: Performance and style hit the grass running with Husqvarna Z200 series zero-turn mowers. These mowers are built to last, with reinforced steel cutting decks, premium integrated transmissions and an ultra-durable frame. And they're user-friendly, with a convenient control panel and spring-assisted deck lift system.

Title: Z345 54"
Description: Go from exhausting to exciting! Husqvarna Z345 zero-turn mowers have been designed to give you the optimal mowing experience. You'll glide across your lawn with the best-in-class* SmoothRide™ suspension system and all-terrain tires. While the heavy-duty Kawasaki engine will keep your mower running like new season after season.

Title: Z248FX
Description: Performance and style hit the grass running with the Husqvarna Z248FX zero-turn mower. With our dial-adjusted seat suspension system, you can easily customize the mowing feel for your needs. This mower is built to last, with reinforced steel cutting decks, premium integrated transmissions and an ultra-durable frame. And they're user-friendly, with a convenient control panel and spring-assisted deck lift system.

Description: Performance and style hit the grass running with the Husqvarna Z254FX zero-turn mower. With our dial-adjusted seat suspension system, you can easily customize the mowing feel for your needs. This mower is built to last, with reinforced steel cutting decks, premium integrated transmissions and an ultra-durable frame. And they're user-friendly, with a convenient control panel and spring-assisted deck lift system.

Title: Automower® 580 EPOS®
Description: Husqvarna Automower® 580 EPOS® – a high-performance robotic mower for demanding commercial turf care. Engineered especially for high-maintenance sports fields requiring frequent mowing and exceptional grass quality. It features an extra-ordinary strong cutting motor, ensuring optimal cutting results down to 0.4", even on intensively fertilized surfaces with very strong grass growth. The satellite-based Husqvarna EPOS® technology enables wire free installation, allowing you to customise different work areas and set temporary stay-out zones. Additionally, EPOS® will facilitate deep soil aeration and turf renovation work without the risk of downtime. Built for durability with a reinforced rubberized front, this model also offers active wheel brushes, available as an accessory, to enhance traction. EPOS® RS5 Reference Station is required.
VariantName: 970 80 38-05 (AM 580 EPOS US, CA ROBOTIC LAWN MOWER)

Title: 320iL and 230iB Bundle
Description:
Lightweight meets powerful with the Husqvarna Weed Eater® 320iL and 230iB leaf blower bundle. The dual-direction trimmer features a lighter design and a faster cutting speed so you can work quicker and more comfortably. And with best-in-class weight and superior blowing power, the blower easily moves leaves and debris. All Husqvarna battery tools feature proprietary active cooling technology to deliver more consistent power and extend battery life.

*When compared to total weight (with battery) and RPM of the leading competitor’s string trimmer with a 56V, 5.0 Amp Hour battery.
**Based on total weight of tool & battery sold together as a kit. At maximum performance of 650 CFM.
***When compared to the capabilities of other 40V string trimmers on the market as of June 2022.

Title: EPOS® Reference station RS 4G
Description: EPOS® RS 4G is equipped with a triple-band GNSS receiver designed for high reliability and precision. Cloud connectivity enables firmware-over-the-air (FOTA) updates to ensure sustained performance. The reference station delivers RTK correction data via a single robust reference station, providing wide-area coverage of up to 15 miles over the 4G cellular network.

Title: 550i XP® (battery and charger included)
Description:
Husqvarna 550i XP is a battery chainsaw with an exceptional combination of outstanding power-to-weight and slim, lightweight design. An ideal, versatile solution for professionals who need agility, high reliability and the capability to handle the most demanding tasks. Thanks to the flexible battery system, 550i XP can easily be adapted to different daily needs. The B540X battery ensures peak power and runtime, and supports longer bars, while the lighter B330X offers outstanding maneuverability. This chainsaw has a new graphical display that gives complete control, delivering detailed information about battery level and the health and status of the product. Additionally, the display allows easy management of the SavE mode.

*When paired with a B330X or B540X battery, compared to the power output of all Husqvarna battery chainsaws as of July 2025
